zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanora d'Léon於0955年之前出生在法國時，她的父親Herve de León I-46歲，母親Princess Matilda of Champagne-41歲。她和Hubert Porter至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1061年在英國哈普爾巴辛斯托可，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: d'Léon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillon
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanora d'Léon was born before 0955, in France, her father, Herve de León I, was -46 and her mother, Princess Matilda of Champagne, was -41. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Hubert Porter. She died in 1061, in Basingstoke, Hampshire, England, and was buried in England.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanora d'Léon(이)가 0955년 이전 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herve de León I(은)는 -46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Matilda of Champagne(은)는 -41세였다. 그녀는 Hubert Porter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1061년 영국 함프실르 바징스토크에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.
